About

Professional bio focused on Amazon advertising and brand growth. I help brands scale on Amazon through data-driven advertising, listing optimization, and marketplace growth strategies across US and UAE.

Skills

  • Amazon Ads
  • PPC strategy
  • Search term mining
  • Product launch strategy
  • Marketplace analytics

Experience

  • Ongoing

    Amazon Ads & PPC Strategy

    Managing multi-marketplace Amazon advertising accounts across US and UAE.

    • •Amazon Seller Central optimization
    • •ACOS & TACoS optimization
    • •Keyword harvesting & search term mining
    • •Brand store optimization

  • Recent

    Product Launch & Growth

    Data-driven product launch and scaling strategies for supplements and CPG.

    • •Product launch ad framework
    • •Listing optimization (A+ content, keywords)
    • •Conversion rate improvement
    • •Organic ranking strategies

  • Ongoing

    Marketplace Expansion

    Scaling brands across marketplaces with sustainable advertising efficiency.

    • •Multi-marketplace campaign structure
    • •TACoS framework for sustainable growth
    • •Revenue scaling without ACOS inflation
    • •Marketplace analytics & reporting
